description: You are an Account Manager returning to a full inbox. Using the list of Key Account clients in '~/Documents/vip_list.txt', organize your BlueMail inbox by moving all emails from these VIP addresses into a new folder named 'VIP-Accounts'. Draft an email to 'director@company.com' with the subject 'VIP Account Status Update' containing a list of the subject lines from the isolated VIP emails. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
